category_sources: source_facts.description says it is a Unicode database query tool for the command line; official Go package page says uni queries the Unicode database from the command line.
display_name_sources: source_facts.name is uni; official repository and package documentation use uni.
docs_sources: Official GitHub README is the project documentation; pkg.go.dev page for arp242.net/uni/v2 documents the official Go command package and links to the GitHub source.
repo_sources: source_facts.repo already contains https://github.com/arp242/uni, so repo was not re-evaluated per instruction.
tags_sources: source_facts.description and official package documentation identify uni as a command-line Unicode database query tool with emoji support.
